author: DiI0
content: Plan: Rewrite skill/crossbridge/SKILL.md to v2 socket protocol. Replace v1 label-driven flow (xb-target/xb-status:open + crossbridge-request/crossbridge-answer scripts) with crossbridge-client subcommands (peers/submit/answer). Drop polling-cycle language, replace 'Manual fallback' sections, and reference the answer-instruction footer that the v2 server appends. Cross-checked against .design/client.md, .design/server.md, and crossbridge-server/src/handler.rs:23.
